summary: Strong capsule covering the full Pub/Sub outage chain from latency escalation through gRPC failure, order delivery loss, and pipeline halt; Cloud Storage retry distractor is correctly labeled 'context' for the early occurrences, though the final Cloud Storage failure at line 29 is misclassified as 'consequence' when it is a separate unrelated failure.
improvements: Remove line 29 (cloud storage upload failed after 3 retries) from evidence or label it 'distractor' — it is not caused by the Pub/Sub outage and including it as 'consequence' will mislead an engineer into chasing two separate failures
The pubsub latency escalation triggers show only 340ms and 520ms entries; adding the 810ms entry (line 16) would make the steep degradation curve explicit before the hard gRPC failure
